data.summary: [2-Year Anniversary Countdown Login Event] Sensei! Blue Archive's 2-Year Anniversary is almost here.
data.body:
[2-Year Anniversary Countdown Login Event]

Sensei! Blue Archive's 2-Year Anniversary is almost here...!
Log in everyday to get generous Countdown Gifts!

рҹ—“пёҸEvent Period: 11/1 (Wed) 7:00 PM - 11/8 (Wed) 6:59 PM (UTC)

#BlueArchive![6JgIWlrQ4fqvS5QbdgGznO6PLtFGGH1e.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/6JgIWlrQ4fqvS5QbdgGznO6PLtFGGH1e.jpg)

2-Year Anniversary Countdown Gallery: 6 Days to Go!

The second work of art features the Millennium Science School's Seminar students!
(What's going on with Koyuki...? ^^;)

рҹ’ҹIllustrator: Yukiрҹ’ҹ

#BlueArchive![kCR75UIW2eSAvlbXDucG0EfQ5xD7Jstl.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/kCR75UIW2eSAvlbXDucG0EfQ5xD7Jstl.jpg)

2-Year Anniversary Countdown Gallery: 5 Days to Go!

The third work of art features the Hyakkiyako Inner Discipline Club members enjoying the hot springs!
The hot springs must be so peaceful on a quiet night...

рҹ’ҹIllustrator: Hinakiрҹ’ҹ

#BlueArchive![El8cPUayFQY1aM7WWHfJvLbXPdLpdT0a.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/El8cPUayFQY1aM7WWHfJvLbXPdLpdT0a.jpg)

2-Year Anniversary Countdown Gallery: 4 Days to Go!

We're releasing the fourth work of art alongside the Sound Archive: The Orchestra event!
The real concert is sure to be just as breathtaking!

рҹ’ҹIllustrator: nuudoru, DONMINIрҹ’ҹ

#BlueArchive![apIKed5HxJrE9fUuqyL60HOhWnV0O33U.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/apIKed5HxJrE9fUuqyL60HOhWnV0O33U.jpg)![ovptQkfmXE16Z9ji5lSHcEoDj3WOlqqf.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/ovptQkfmXE16Z9ji5lSHcEoDj3WOlqqf.jpg)

Sensei, please allow me to correct the illustrator names...! (I'm sorry!)

<Illustrator: nuudoru, л„ӨлӘЁк°Җ>

2-Year Anniversary Countdown Gallery: 3 Days to Go!

The fifth work of art features our newest student additions, Bunny  Toki and Maid Aris!
If you haven't recruited them yet, we wish you the best of luck in doing so, Sensei!

рҹ’ҹIllustrator: м–‘к°ұмҷ•, Gogokoрҹ’ҹ

#BlueArchive![8pY5fvBOoiZEcvHvCzKcFQsJuH1Uixpt.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/8pY5fvBOoiZEcvHvCzKcFQsJuH1Uixpt.jpg)![N6lF0kNSoJ28wDxCfWvVMf2DW8yGvl4t.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/N6lF0kNSoJ28wDxCfWvVMf2DW8yGvl4t.jpg)

2-Year Anniversary Countdown Gallery: 2 Days to Go!

The sixth work of art features Trinity's After-School Sweets Club! You could get a sugar rush just standing in that Club Room!

рҹ’ҹIllustrator: н•ңлқјк°җк·Өрҹ’ҹ

#BlueArchive![9FlDIh2XvIoIZTUdCoPvdQN89rLuJ1vb.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/9FlDIh2XvIoIZTUdCoPvdQN89rLuJ1vb.jpg)

2-Year Anniversary Countdown Gallery: 1 Day to Go!

For the eve of Blue Archive's 2-Year Anniversary, this work of art features the C&C and Tea Party members!
Doesn't this illustration reflect their personalities perfectly? ^o^

рҹ’ҹIllustrator: мҲңмҲҳн•ңл¶ҲмҲңл¬ј / л””м–Қрҹ’ҹ

#BlueArchive![NItwD1RqGBdB44yIhB0HEBtVeHdfa68Y.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/NItwD1RqGBdB44yIhB0HEBtVeHdfa68Y.jpg)![JIiqaHjOjgSBzan24on3p42H3B6AKKr2.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/JIiqaHjOjgSBzan24on3p42H3B6AKKr2.jpg)

Happy 2-Year Anniversary, Blue Archive!!!

Please keep taking care of us in the future, Sensei!
(There's a special gift waiting in your mailbox, so log in now to claim it!)

рҹ’ҹIllustrator: Kokosandoрҹ’ҹ

#BlueArchive![pNheshKjwEWHQKA5BVlHtxztt566JktZ.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/pNheshKjwEWHQKA5BVlHtxztt566JktZ.jpg)
